_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Pumpkin
author: cheaplydothost@proton.me
description: Pumpkin is a Minecraft server built entirely in Rust, offering a fast, efficient, and customizable experience. It prioritizes performance and player enjoyment while adhering to the core mechanics of the game

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates

cd /mnt/server

BINARY_URL="https://github.com/Pumpkin-MC/Pumpkin/releases/download/nightly/pumpkin-X64-Linux"

curl -L -o pumpkin "$BINARY_URL"
chmod +x pumpkin

echo "Installed files:"
ls -la

# ----------------------------
# ENV CONFIG (with defaults)
# ----------------------------

JAVA_PORT="${SERVER_PORT:-25565}"
BEDROCK_PORT="${BEDROCK_PORT:-19132}"

JAVA_ENABLED="${JAVA_ENABLED:-true}"
BEDROCK_ENABLED="${BEDROCK_ENABLED:-false}"

SEED="${SEED:-1783395253786350322}"
MAX_PLAYERS="${MAX_PLAYERS:-10}"
VIEW_DISTANCE="${VIEW_DISTANCE:-10}"
SIMULATION_DISTANCE="${SIMULATION_DISTANCE:-10}"
DIFFICULTY="${DIFFICULTY:-Normal}"
MOTD="${MOTD:-A blazingly fast Pumpkin server!}"

ONLINE_MODE="${ONLINE_MODE:-true}"
ENCRYPTION="${ENCRYPTION:-true}"
ALLOW_NETHER="${ALLOW_NETHER:-true}"
ALLOW_END="${ALLOW_END:-true}"
HARDCORE="${HARDCORE:-false}"

WHITELIST="${WHITELIST:-false}"
ENFORCE_WHITELIST="${ENFORCE_WHITELIST:-false}"
ALLOW_CHAT_REPORTS="${ALLOW_CHAT_REPORTS:-false}"
GAMEMODE=${GAMEMODE:-Survival}
RCON_ENABLED="${RCON_ENABLED:-false}"
RCON_PORT="${RCON_PORT:-25575}"

# ----------------------------
# WRITE CONFIG
# ----------------------------

cat > pumpkin.toml <<EOF
java_edition = ${JAVA_ENABLED}
java_edition_address = "0.0.0.0:${JAVA_PORT}"

bedrock_edition = ${BEDROCK_ENABLED}
bedrock_edition_address = "0.0.0.0:${BEDROCK_PORT}"

seed = "${SEED}"
max_players = ${MAX_PLAYERS}
view_distance = ${VIEW_DISTANCE}
simulation_distance = ${SIMULATION_DISTANCE}
default_difficulty = "${DIFFICULTY}"

op_permission_level = 4
allow_nether = ${ALLOW_NETHER}
allow_end = ${ALLOW_END}
hardcore = ${HARDCORE}

online_mode = ${ONLINE_MODE}
encryption = ${ENCRYPTION}

motd = "${MOTD}"
tps = 20.0
default_gamemode = "${GAMEMODE}"
force_gamemode = false

scrub_ips = true
use_favicon = true
default_level_name = "world"

allow_chat_reports = ${ALLOW_CHAT_REPORTS}
white_list = ${WHITELIST}
enforce_whitelist = ${ENFORCE_WHITELIST}

[logging]
enabled = true
threads = true
color = true
timestamp = true
file = "latest.log"

[resource_pack.java]
enabled = false
url = ""
sha1 = ""
prompt_message = ""
force = false

[resource_pack.bedrock]
enabled = false
force = false
packs = []

[world]
lighting = "default"
autosave_ticks = 0

[world.chunk]
type = "pump"

[networking.authentication]
enabled = true
connect_timeout = 5000
read_timeout = 5000
prevent_proxy_connections = false

[networking.authentication.player_profile]
allow_banned_players = false
allowed_actions = ["FORCED_NAME_CHANGE", "USING_BANNED_SKIN"]

[networking.authentication.textures]
enabled = true
allowed_url_schemes = ["http", "https"]
allowed_url_domains = [".minecraft.net", ".mojang.com"]

[networking.authentication.textures.types]
skin = true
cape = true
elytra = true

[networking.query]
enabled = true
address = "0.0.0.0:${JAVA_PORT}"

[networking.rcon]
enabled = ${RCON_ENABLED}
address = "0.0.0.0:${RCON_PORT}"
password = ""
max_connections = 10

[networking.rcon.logging]
logged_successfully = true
wrong_password = true
commands = true
quit = true

[networking.proxy]
enabled = false

[networking.proxy.velocity]
enabled = false
secret = ""

[networking.proxy.bungeecord]
enabled = false

[networking.java_compression]
enabled = true
threshold = 256
level = 4

[networking.bedrock_compression]
enabled = true
threshold = 256
level = 4

[networking.lan_broadcast]
enabled = false

[commands]
use_console = true
use_tty = true
log_console = true
default_op_level = 0

[chat]
format = "<{DISPLAYNAME}> {MESSAGE}"

[pvp]
enabled = true
hurt_animation = true
protect_creative = true
knockback = true
swing = true

[server_links]
enabled = true
bug_report = "https://github.com/Pumpkin-MC/Pumpkin/issues"
support = ""
status = ""
feedback = ""
community = ""
website = ""
forums = ""
news = ""
announcements = ""

[server_links.custom]

[player_data]
save_player_data = true
save_player_cron_interval = 300

[fun]
april_fools = false

[recipe]
send_recipes = true

[plugins]
blocked_permissions = []
EOF

echo "Generated pumpkin.toml"
